title: Refine Codegen Generated Ownership Boundary

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Refine PR #949 so generated-owned Python executable wrapper code lives under generated/python, package-local source only keeps stable import bridges and hand-owned runtime adapters, and future module-specific primitives remain explicit schema-backed contracts.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Move generated command adapter metadata into generated/python/*/generated_command_adapters.json, delete package-local generated_command_adapters.py modules, and update contract/proof/packaging surfaces.
completion_criteria: Generated Python command packages expose the executable main wrapper from generated/python.
Console script metadata points at package-local generated_cli_package bridge modules, not package-local generated entrypoint modules.
Static proof rejects generated-owned executable entrypoint modules outside generated/python except stable bridge shims.
Generated command adapter metadata is emitted as JSON under generated/python and loaded as data by checks/conformance, not imported as package-local Python modules.
canonical_core.continuation_owner: #951 for broader module IR and primitive-extension extraction

goal: Refine PR #949 so generated-owned Python executable wrapper code lives under generated/python and package-local source only keeps stable import bridges plus hand-owned runtime adapters.
non_goals: Do not extract the whole codegen package into a separate repository in this slice.
Do not migrate all module IR into per-module namespaces in this slice.
Do not implement TypeScript, Bash, or PowerShell completion in this slice.
Do not eliminate stable package-local import bridges required for editable/install packaging unless generated packages remain importable in both modes.

execution_run.what happened: Generated Python packages now expose main() from generated/python generated_cli_package modules. Console scripts target generated_cli_package:main bridge modules. Package-local generated_cli_entrypoint.py files were deleted. TypeScript runtime handoff now invokes generated_cli_package main through python -c.
execution_run.scope touched: command adapter generator, command_adapter_generation contract and schema, generated Python JSON adapter metadata, package script metadata, proof tests, packaging tests, docs, and planning records
execution_run.changed surfaces: scripts/generate/generate_command_adapters.py; generated/python/*/generated_command_adapters.json; src/agentic_workspace/contracts; package-local generated_command_adapters.py deletions; packaging/report/conformance tests; docs; this execplan and mutation provenance
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_adapters.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; focused pytest for conformance/report/packaging; make test-workspace; make lint-workspace; make test-memory; make lint-memory; make test-planning; make lint-planning; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker-conformance --require-docker
execution_run.result for continuation: This slice satisfies the generated executable wrapper location boundary for #950. Continuation moved generated command adapter metadata out of package-local Python modules and into generated/python JSON artifacts. Broader module IR and primitive-extension architecture is filed as #951.
execution_run.next step: Commit and push the generated command adapter metadata JSON slice to PR #949.
